name: Streamliners for Answer Set Programming
summary: arXiv:2604.19251v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Streamliner constraints reduce the search space of combinatorial problems by ruling out portions of the solution space. We adapt the Stream...
description: arXiv:2604.19251v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Streamliner constraints reduce the search space of combinatorial problems by ruling out portions of the solution space. We adapt the StreamLLM approach, which uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate streamliners for Constraint Programming, to Answer Set Programming (ASP). Given an ASP encoding and a few small training instances, we...
author: Florentina Voboril (TU Wien), Martin Gebser (University of Klagenfurt), Stefan Szeider (TU Wien), Alice Tarzariol (University of Klagenfurt)
